title: High-throughput 96-well plate-based porcine antibody isolation protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"chk4n","text":"This protocol describes a modified column chromatography technique to isolate both IgG and IgA from pregnant/lactating swine to use in a variety of immunoassays. This high throughput method allows for both a rapid and consistent isotype yield from individual animals and different tissue samples.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ec1p3","text":"Prepare 1x PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"90htv","text":"Prepare 0.1M Glycine  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b1bpf","text":"Prepare 70% ETOH","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6n4v9","text":"Prepare Ab Binding Buffer (10mM TRIS, 1mM EDTA, 300mM NaCl)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

In House","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3chq4","text":"Corning Mediatech Cell Culture Phosphate Buffered Saline (10X) Cat# MT-46013CM (Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nhgn","text":"Universal 200ul Pipette tips Cat# 76322-144 (VWR)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8867b","text":"BrandTech Scientific 781722, 96-Well Plates, immunoGrade, Clear Transparent, Flat Bottom Cat# 91-415F (Genesee Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dihpm","text":"Multiscreen 96 well Plate, hydrophobic PVDF membrane Cat# MSIPS4W10 (Millipore Sigma)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f93j0","text":"Thermo Scientific NanoDrop 2000c Spectrophotometer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fh5ll","text":"Sorvall Legend XTR (Refrigerated), 120V (Thermo Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fjdqa","text":"Sorvall Legend Micro 21R Microcentrifuge (Thermo Scientific) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f4in7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dav15","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 100 µL, sample (serum/milk/colostrum) to 100 µL, Ab Binding Buffer - DO NOT ADD ANY PRECIPITATE TO THE MIX
Centrifuge all samples at Room temperature for 2000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute
Remove the Multiscreen 96 well ELISpot Plate from packaging
Add 50 µL, Protein G, CaptureSelect IgA, or Peptide M to each well - ONLY USE ONE RESIN PER WELL
Wash all wells by adding 200 µL, 1x 7.4pH PBS to each well
Place the Multiscreen 96 well ELISpot Plate on top of a 96-Well immunoGrade ELISA Plate ensuring the ejection ports of the ELISpot plate are in line with the ELISA plate wells
Centrifuge the plate stack at 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes
Discard flow through from the bottom plate
Add 100 µL, Sample (serum/milk/colostrum) / Ab Binding Buffer mix per well to each plate
Restack the plates
Place the plate on a plate shaker and shake 600 rpm, Room temperature, 30 minutes
Remove the plate stack from the shaker and centrifuge the plate at 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes
Discard the flow through from the bottom plate
Wash all wells by adding 200 µL, Ab Binding Buffer to each well
Centrifuge the plate stack at 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes
Discard the flow through from the bottom plate
Place a new 96-Well immunoGrade ELISA Plate under the Multiscreen 96 well ELISpot Plate to ensure that collected antibody are pure
Restack the plates
Add 100 µL, 0.1M Glycine and incubate 00:02:00, , Room temperature
Elute the antibodies by centrifuging the plate stack at 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes
Add 20 µL, 1M TRIS to each well to neutralize the solution
Label one Amicon ultra 0.5 50k Centrifuge filter for each sample
Remove the 220 µL, glycine-TRIS solution from the well and place into the corresponding Amicon ultra 0.5 50k Centrifuge filter
Centrifuge the filter tubes at 12000 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Wash each sample with 400 µL, 1x 7.4pH PBS
Centrifuge the filter tubes at 12000 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Label one Amicon ultra 0.5 50k Centrifuge collection tube to store each sample
Invert the Amicon ultra 0.5 50k Centrifuge filter into the new labeled storage tube
Centrifuge the filter tubes at 1000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute - this should yield ~ 100ul of isolated antibody
Remove the filter from each tube and store isolated antibodies at 4 °C until later use
Use NanoDrop, select the "Protein A280" program
Pipette 1 µL, isolated antibody on the NanoDrop pedestal
Analyze the sample
Record published mg/mL
Quickly vortex all samples to ensure no clotting from serum and no fat blockages from milk
Repeat step 24 and 25
Wash all wells by adding 50 µL, 70% ETOH to each well
Centrifuge the plate stack at 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes
Discard flow through from the bottom plate
Repeat Steps 19-21 3 times
creator: John Byrne
